headline: Design the business around execution, not generic AI claims
subheadline: The strongest version of VoiceToWebsite is a platform that helps people plan, route, and ship meaningful work while moving buyers into the right revenue lane.
stepsHeadline: A clean path from first impression to paid engagement

steps.title: Educate
steps.description: Use the homepage and blog to explain what VoiceToWebsite does and why execution matters more than generic AI novelty.

steps.title: Segment
steps.description: Use solutions and pricing pages to help founders, agencies, and technical teams understand which offer fits them.

steps.title: Convert
steps.description: Move buyers into the right product lane: subscription, launch sprint, or enterprise deployment.

sections.title: For founders
sections.description: Use one operating system to clarify the offer, publish the pages, and keep revenue moves happening without a bloated stack.

sections.title: For agencies
sections.description: Turn repeated delivery into productized workflows, implementation offers, and cleaner handoff between sales and execution.

sections.title: For technical teams
sections.description: Keep more control over generated work with repo-backed execution, payment-aware offers, and release-aware operations.

faq.question: Why not sell every possible AI use case?
faq.answer: Because a focused promise converts better. Execution, workflow, and system management create a more believable and valuable market position.

faq.question: Which page matters most for conversion?
faq.answer: The homepage matters most first, but pricing and product pages usually determine whether serious buyers take the next step.

cta.heading: Use the product pages and pricing to convert the right buyers into the right lane.
cta.body: Positioning opens the conversation, but checkout-first software and lead-form-first services are what make the business move.
